summary: Matrix recording with rich, well‑balanced sound captures a high‑energy, rock‑focused performance.
review: The FM‑matrix source delivers an excellent, deep‑bass, well‑balanced mix that conveys the audience atmosphere while minimizing drop‑outs. The show itself is described as super‑high energy, tight and rocking with compact 1987‑style punch‑in jams, even if it leans away from the longer spacey explorations. Overall fans are enthusiastic about both the performance and the listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers praise the show as amazing/high‑energy and note an excellent matrix recording; limited number of reviews keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Well‑balanced mix with richer bass and deeper ambiance than a straight board feed; minor FM clipping noted but overall crisp and immersive.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy, compact performance focused on tight rock jams; less emphasis on extended spacey improvisations.
